case_title: CAMPAGNA, ROSE vs. EMBASSY REALTY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPAGNA, ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT EMBASSY REALTY LEE, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMBASSY REALTY LEE, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4837 MISSION STREET, $5,278.65 RENT, $650.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,928.65, LEASE FORFEITED

JUDGE DAVID BALLATI; RPTR SUSAN LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR PLTF MOT/FIX ATNY FEES AND COSTS. CNSL FRED KLARENBACH PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT NOT PRESENT. PROPER NOTICE WAS GIVEN DEFT BUT NO PAPERS IN OPPOSITION TO MOTN WERE RE- CEIVED. CT SIGNS ORDER AWARDING COSTS OF $263.00 PLUS $2407.00 (ATNY FEES) AS COSTS PER CC1717A. CT ALSO AWARDS PER DIEM HOLDOVER DAMAGES OF $3611.40 (78 DAYS AT $46.30 PER DAY) WITH PLTF TO SUBMIT A JUDGMENT FOR THOSE SUPPL DAMAGES. CT DENIES PLTF REQUEST TO RELEASE THE DEPOSIT OF $5778.84 HELD BY CLERK AS THE DEFT'S APPEAL IS STILL PENDING.
